adjudicators.libredwg: follows ODA spec (BL) and decodes 0x9999999A = low 32 bits of IEEE-754 1.6
adjudicators.corpus_physics: libdxfrw's BD read of 1.6 is exact; LibreDWG's BL read is nonsense

note: A spec-faithful differ WILL flag libdxfrw as deviating from ODA. That flag is the wrong direction of finding. Seeded per round-3 M2 to prevent re-file. See plan §1 (MTEXT-4 anti-finding), §6.6 T3 tier, §6.8 spec-not-final-authority.

actualBehavior: R2007+ reads only a BS and derives the two B flags; libdxfrw's 2-bit read is length-equivalent for occurring values

adjudicators.libredwg: R2007+ reads only the BS — matches AutoCAD output

note: A spec-only auditor would have filed 'CRITICAL: missing BS for R2007+ desyncs every 2007+ vport'. Refuted by LibreDWG evidence. Seeded per round-3 M2.

specClaim: Weight is BD-vs-RD 2-bit-prefix difference; would desync every weighted spline if wrong

adjudicators.corpus_physics: row 20 (Weight) has ZERO coverage across the 214-file corpus — unvalidatable

note: Also known as SPLINE-01 latent. Seeded per round-3 M2 to prevent re-file. Verdict revisits when P6 SPLINE unit runs OR corpus is expanded per SP1.5.
